values: These are small examples for the new two-tab timetable input template.
Input_Template contains the official required fields.
Remarks_(optional) contains optional overrides joined only by Requirement ID.
Leave optional cells blank to use defaults: weeks 1-13, flexible weekly scheduling, no fixed day/time/date.
Staff 1 ID is required. Staff 2-4 are co-teachers; a filled co-teacher must include an ID.
